Description: Nudgebee EventBridge Integration Add-on for Existing Customers - Creates EventBridge resources only

NudgebeeExternalId.Description: The Nudgebee external ID for EventBridge token-based account lookup. Do not change or share this.

NudgebeeAwsAccountId.Description: The Nudgebee AWS account ID for EventBridge cross-account integration.

NudgebeeSqsQueueName.Description: The name of the Nudgebee SQS queue for EventBridge events.

Properties.Description: Role for EventBridge to send events to cross-account Nudgebee SQS queue
Role for Lambda that deploys EventBridge rules to all AWS regions
Deploys Nudgebee EventBridge passthrough rules to all enabled AWS regions

EventBridgeRoleArn.Description: The ARN of the IAM role used by EventBridge to send events to Nudgebee SQS queue

ExternalId.Description: External ID for EventBridge token-based account lookup (automatically handled by Nudgebee UI)

MultiRegionLambdaArn.Description: ARN of the Lambda function that deploys EventBridge rules to all regions
